title: armeria intermedia
intro: Armeria intermedia, also known as Intermediate Thrift or Sea Thrift, is a low-growing, flowering plant native to Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant actions. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant properties, as well as to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Armeria intermedia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
